productName: Sativa - OG Chem Bubble Hash Banger 1g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps OG Chem flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of chemical, diesel, and pine, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
